biological_replicate: biological quadruplicates of S. pneumoniae D39
technical_replicate: cultures for metabolomic analyses were grown as detailed above in biological sextuplicate.
experimental_design: Comparison of the Cd2+ peaks with the Zn2+ proteome showed overlapping spatial distribution of the peaks.
factor_value: Exposure to 30 μM Cd2+ perturbs pneumococcal growth.
number_of_fractions: AEX fractions were collected in 1-min intervals, corresponding to 400 μL fractions.
number_of_biological_replicates: biological quadruplicates of S. pneumoniae D39
